recommendations.justification: Hotel Harbour, Seoul ranks #1 for this traveler on family-friendly (+0.77), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The kids loved the pool and the staff were wonderful with our toddler."

supporting_evidence.quote: The kids loved the pool and the staff were wonderful with our toddler.
Fantastic for families — connecting rooms, a kids' club, and high chairs at breakfast.
Plenty for children to do and the family suite had loads of space.
